parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_logs (log_type, user_id, channel_id, message, thread_ts, status, category, created_at)
VALUES (
  'INQUIRY',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.channel_id }}',
  '{{ ($('Webhook').first().json.body.message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.thread_ts || '' }}',
  'OPEN',
  'FINANCE',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs
SET ai_response_text = '{{ $json.responseText }}',
    log_type = 'INFO_RECEIVED'
WHERE id = {{ $json.logId }}

SELECT log_type, message, ai_response_text, status
FROM app.helpdesk_logs
WHERE thread_ts = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.thread_ts }}'
  AND thread_ts != ''
  AND log_type IN ('INQUIRY', 'AI_RESPONSE')
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 20

INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_logs (
  log_type, inquiry_id, user_id, channel_id, message, category, priority, summary,
  ai_response_text, thread_ts, turn_number, is_multi_turn, status, created_at
)
VALUES (
  'AI_RESPONSE',
  {{ $json.inquiry_log_id }},
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.original_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  '{{ ($json.summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_response_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.thread_ts }}',
  {{ $json.turn_number || 1 }},
  {{ $json.is_multi_turn || false }},
  'IN_PROGRESS',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ticket_id FROM app.finance_tickets WHERE thread_ts = '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.thread_ts }}' AND thread_ts != '' LIMIT 1), '') as ticket_id

INSERT INTO app.finance_tickets (
  ticket_id, reporter_name, request_type, urgency, summary, source_channel, status, thread_ts, log_id, created_at
)
VALUES (
  'FIN-' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD-HH24MISS'),
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.category }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.priority }}',
  '{{ ($('Parse Agent Response').first().json.summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'slack',
  'OPEN',
  '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.thread_ts }}',
  {{ $('Log AI Response').first().json.id }},
  NOW()
)
RETURNING ticket_id
